---
name: create-instructions
agent: Instructions Generator Agent
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Take the information below and generate an agents instructions .md file for it in the /docs directory. If a .md file is provided, use that, otherwise generate an appropriate filename based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference this new docs file. If no information is provided below, prompt the user to give necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
